name: usersettings

metadata.name: usersettings
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

documentation:
usersettings
------------
"usersettings" is a python module for easily managing persistent settings
using an editable format and stored in an OS-appropriate location
(windows/macOS/unix are supported).

For more information, please refer to README.md or the `usersettings github
page <https://github.com/glvnst/usersettings>`.

modules.name: usersettings
documentation: Provide interface for persistent portable editable user settings

classes.name: usersettings.Settings

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.__init__
documentation:
Create the settings object, using the specified app id (a reversed rfc
1034 identifier, e.g. com.example.apps.thisapp

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.add_setting
documentation: Define a settings option (and default value)

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.load_settings
documentation: Set default values and parse stored settings file

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.save_settings
documentation: Write the settings data to disk

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.__getattr__
documentation: Provide attribute-based access to stored config data

methods.name: usersettings.Settings.__setattr__
documentation: Provide attribute-based access to stored config data
Provide interface for portable persistent user editable settings
